title: Doctoral Programs
content:
Doctoral Programs

Chairperson’s Message

MENU

The Educational Administration and Supervision Program at Istanbul Okan University offers a doctoral degree study for researchers who aim to do academic studies in the field of Educational Administration in Turkey and abroad.

The Program also contributes directly to the training of scientifically-equipped academic staff needed by Educational Studies programs in Turkey.

Through various courses about educational leadership, educational administration, contemporary topics in the field of education, and practices in specialized areas, the Program offers students a scholarly framework that will enable them to approach research issues from an educational administrator’s perspective.

The program is open to graduates in all fields interested in theoretical and practical matters of education. Students who are non-native speakers of Turkish or are of a different nationality are expected to have a Turkish proficiency of B2 level.

On top of the well-designed course contents, one of our Program's unique aspects is that the courses are taught by renowned lecturers who have publications in national or international scientific journals in the field.

Prof. Dr. Gülsün Atanur Baskan
